text: Here, the clean lines and modern glass partitions create a sense of clarity and openness, while the angled view hints at an off-balance perception—inviting me to question the order of things. The distant glow of screens and structured displays beckon the mind to engage, yet, I am also aware of the careful construction behind such curated spaces. I feel a combination of curiosity and slight detachment, as if I am an observer both welcomed and kept at an arm’s length by the glass. There’s an undercurrent of anticipation—what knowledge or insight awaits beyond that transparent barrier?
